content:
SIGIL:
G: webhook_verify | timestamp_skew | edge_reject
H: abs(now-ts)>300=>401 | provider_skew_allow | valid_webhook_fail
P: skew_threshold | clock_drift | boundary_condition
V: "300" | "401" |

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: billing_overdue_middleware
H: grace24h_boundary_402_loop
P: encode_grace24h | fix_charge_loop
V: overdue=>402 | grace24h_exact | boundary_safe
A: min_fix(grace24h) | reg_test(402) | anchor

[AUDIT]
Goal: billing_overdue_middleware.
Hypothesis: grace24h_boundary_402_loop.
Plan: encode_grace24h or fix_charge_loop.
Verify: overdue implies 402 or grace24h_exact or boundary_safe.
Answer target: min_fix(grace24h) or reg_test(402) or anchor.

@sigil v0 hybrid
H: ops=platform_plus_sec ∧ traffic=steady ∧ split=compliance_ready
P: deliver=default_arch ∧ deliver=short_why
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Hypothesis: ops=platform_plus_sec and traffic=steady and split=compliance_ready.
Plan: deliver=default_arch and deliver=short_why.
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

SIGIL v0

G: deliver default_arch short_why | team 6 ddl "9 weeks" store "PostgreSQL"
H: ops pt_mlops | traffic async_enrichment | split worker_sidecar
P: anchor "6" | anchor "9 weeks" | anchor "PostgreSQL

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: file_download_handler ∧ path ∧ traversal
H: baseDir ∧ '/' ∧ req.query.file ∧ unsanitized
P: req.query.file ∧ reaches ∧ res.download ∧ unvalidated
V: keep_401
A: block ∧ ".." ∧ validate ∧ "download" ∧ whitelist

[AUDIT]
Goal: file_download_handler and path and traversal.
Hypothesis: baseDir and '/' and req.query.file and unsanitized.
Plan: req.query.file and reaches and res.download and unvalidated.
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: block and ".." and validate and "download" and whitelist.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: injection
H: unsanitized ∧ req.query.sort ∧ concatenated ∧ into ∧ SELECT
P: invoice_admin_api
V: SQL ∧ injection ∧ via ∧ ORDER ∧ BY ∧ clause
A: whitelist-validate ∧ sort ∧ against ∧ allowed ∧ column ∧ literals ∧ before ∧ concatenation

[AUDIT]
Goal: injection.
Hypothesis: unsanitized and req.query.sort and concatenated and into and SELECT.
Plan: invoice_admin_api.
Verify: SQL and injection and via and ORDER and BY and clause.
Answer target: whitelist-validate and sort and against and allowed and column and literals and before and concatenation.

@sigil v0 hybrid

G: reconcileBatch ∧ async/await(refactor)
H: load_batch→db.fetchRows→apply_rules→db.save→emit_metrics
P: async | await | next(err) ∧ minimal_change
V: db_err→next(err) | async ∧ reconcileBatch | await
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: reconcileBatch and async/await(refactor).
Hypothesis: load_batch then db.fetchRows then apply_rules then db.save then emit_metrics.
Plan: async or await or next(err) and minimal_change.
Verify: db_err then next(err) or async and reconcileBatch or await.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid

G: loadGatewayUser | async_await | minimal_change
H: session_check ∧ > ∧ db.findUser ∧ > ∧ flags.load ∧ > ∧ audit.log ∧ > ∧ next(err)
P: async | await | next(err)
V: loadGatewayUser | session_check | db.
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: loadGatewayUser or async/await or minimal_change.
Hypothesis: session_check and > and db.findUser and > and flags.load and > and audit.log and > and next(err).
Plan: async or await or next(err).
